title: Senior Doctor - Wockhardt Hospitals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Wockhardt Hospitals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!
